name: Peach Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over peaches; let stand until skins can be easily removed.
2. Dip in cold water, peel.
3. Remove pits and red fibers; cut into chunks.
4. Place immediately in vinegar-water to prevent browning.
5. In a saucepan, combine brown sugar and the next 4 ingredients (raisins, honey, distilled white vinegar).
6. Add cloves and cinnamon tied in cheesecloth bag.
7. Drain peaches; add to syrup.
8. Simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
9. Remove spice bag and quickly pack one clean hot jar at a time.
10. Fill jars to within 1/2 inch of the top, making sure syrup covers the fruit.
11. Seal each jar at once.
12. Process in boiling water bath for 5 minutes.
Makes 4-5 half pints.
